title: taraxacum subnefrens
intro: Taraxacum subnefrens, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus that is native to certain regions. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subnefrens include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and possess antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and improve liver function. Taraxacum subnefrens is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
